settings.block_des: Soft wax is a type of depilatory wax applied to skin that remains soft and sticky after application and requires the use of wax strips for removal. Soft wax spreads easily and adheres to both the hair and the skin, making it more likely to irritate and lift skin, but more efficient for larger areas like the back, legs, and chest, gripping hard to reach or fine hairs easily. Our soft wax comes in plastic tubs that can be inserted directly into warmers, allowing easy and quick melting.

Salon-Quality Results: Our professional-grade soft wax allows those of any skill level to achieve amazing results every time.

Perfect for All Skin Types: Bombshell has soft wax formulated for all hair types and skin sensitivities, including hypoallergenic rosin-free options. Our gentle, effective formulas allow for effective, comfortable waxing for all.

Cost-Effective: We believe in making salon-quality waxing products accessible to all with our affordable pricing.

settings.block_description_question: First prepare the skin using a pre wax cleanser, oil, and/or powder. Melt the wax to a honey like consistency, test a small patch on your wrist before the client. Apply the wax using an applicator in the direction of hair growth, spread thin. Press a waxing strip onto the waxed area, smoothing it down in the same direction as hair growth. Hold the skin taut, then quickly pull the strip back in the opposite direction of hair growth, keeping it close to the skin. Avoid pulling up and keep the skin anchored so it doesn’t pull up with the hair and strip. Afterwards, apply a post wax lotion to calm the skin and reduce any irritation.

settings.block_title_question: What is the difference between hard wax and soft wax?
settings.block_description_question:
Soft wax is applied warm and removed using a woven or non-woven strip, which is pressed onto the wax and quickly pulled off. Soft wax adheres to both the hair and skin, making it more effective for larger areas like legs, arms, and back waxing. It provides a quicker process but can also lead to more skin irritation.

Hard wax is thicker, applied warm and once hardened is removed without the use of a strip. This makes hard wax ideal for sensitive areas like the face, underarms, and bikini line, as it adheres only to the hair and not the skin, reducing the likelihood of irritation.

Both waxes effectively remove hair, but the choice depends on the sensitivity of the area being treated and personal comfort.

Bombshell Wax offers 3 soft strip wax options
CLEARLi Zero, a hypoallergenic wax, with a clear color (see through) and fragrance free. Great for clients with allergies or extra sensitive skin.
Rose Petal, a creme wax with a pink color, subtle rose scent, and creamy texture.
Honey Kiss, a honey based wax with a golden color and smooth consistency.

settings.description_asked: Frequently asked questions related to soft wax.

settings.block_content: A superior Beeswax blend, carefully sourced with ethical standards.
Adheres more to the hair and not the skin, leaving the skin feeling soft & supple and clients feeling confident & fresh.
Doing business together, we help animals, people, plants and our planet to thrive.
